resources.label: GPT Description
resources.content: Upload your project brief and get a structured, aesthetic HTML project plan with risks, a quick win, and an interactive checklist.

resources.label: GPT Instructions File
resources.description: The full instruction set for your Custom GPT. Download this file, copy the entire contents, and paste into the Instructions field.

resources.label: Run Your Custom GPT
resources.instruction: Upload your mission debrief .txt file from Level 2 into the chat, then send this prompt:
resources.content: Here is my project brief. Please create my project plan.
resources.note: Your Custom GPT will read your mission debrief and generate a fully structured HTML project plan - with risks, a quick win, and an interactive checklist.
